content: Start the concept note interview for Porto Alegre. Use the /concept-note skill flow. Always use the ask_user tool for multiple-choice questions instead of writing them as text.
Let me get started. I'll read the concept note template and set up the run folder.
Good, I have the template loaded and the city knowledge for Porto Alegre. Let me set up the run folder and kick off Phase 1.

## Phase 1: Project Identification

Welcome! I'm helping you build a BPJP/C40 concept note for **Porto Alegre, RS**.

Here's what I already know from the knowledge base:
- **Municipality**: Porto Alegre (pop. ~1.39M, HDI 0.805)
- **State**: Rio Grande do Sul
- **Key context**: The May 2024 catastrophic floods — worst in RS history, 48% of the city flooded, 5.35m water level (59cm above the 1941 record), >USD 15B in damages statewide

This makes Porto Alegre a strong candidate for climate resilience funding. Let me ask you a few key decisions to shape the project.
